features.name: Swarm
features.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through any opening large enough for a Tiny rat. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Bites
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 5 (2d4) Piercing damage, or 2 (1d4) Piercing damage if the swarm is Bloodied.

tactical_info.combat_role: Urban Pest Swarm - Basic harassment unit with climbing
tactical_info.positioning: Uses climbing speed for walls and urban vertical movement
tactical_info.damage_output: 5 piercing damage (2 when bloodied) with basic swarm tactics
tactical_info.key_abilities: Climb speed for urban environments, darkvision
tactical_info.weaknesses: Low AC and HP, minimal special abilities
tactical_info.synergies: Good for sewer encounters and urban dungeon harassment
